note: Phase 4 Tracks B-F. Per the plan: pick by current pain. Promote to a story file when you are about to start it.

items.title: Roll up brain.tool_calls into daily aggregates
items.trigger: When tool_calls table size starts hurting /admin query latency
items.notes: Default plan: nightly rollup into brain.tool_calls_daily (tool_name, day, count, p50, p99, total_cost, error_count); drop raw rows older than 30 days

items.title: Cost spike alerting
items.trigger: Always wanted; cheap; do once budget feels real
items.notes: If today's cost > 3x trailing 7-day average, send email via Resend/Mailgun (~free at this volume)

items.title: Weekly dedup audit script (migrate/audit_dedup.py)
items.trigger: When entity duplicates start showing up in answers
items.notes: Per entity type: pairwise similarity (Levenshtein/Jaro-Winkler/embedding cosine), flag pairs >0.85 into brain.dedup_candidates

items.title: /admin/dedup view for merging candidates
items.notes: Side-by-side cards; Merge into A/B or 'different' buttons; calls Graphiti merge or copies edges + deletes B

items.track: D - Entity types as throughput justifies
items.title: Add JournalEntry entity
items.notes: Define entity, update relevant tools, optionally backfill

items.track: D - Entity types as throughput justifies
items.title: Add Tweet entity
items.notes: Define entity, update relevant tools, optionally backfill

items.track: D - Entity types as throughput justifies
items.title: Add OmniDevFeature entity
items.trigger: When OmniDev produces structured artifacts worth querying
items.notes: e.g. 'show me features tagged auth shipped this quarter'

items.track: D - Entity types as throughput justifies
items.title: Add Book / Podcast entities
items.trigger: If reading/listening notes become a habit (might never)
items.notes: Skip indefinitely if the habit doesn't materialise

items.track: D - Entity types as throughput justifies
items.title: Enrich Person entity (last_contact, preferred_channel, context)
Add Hermes-style turn-shaped vector layer (pgvector) as second memory provider
items.trigger: 3+ consecutive 'agent should have known X' incidents trace back to graph fragmentation (not missing episodes)
items.notes: Augments, not replaces, the graph; unioned with Graphiti results in parallel queries

items.title: iOS Shortcut polish
items.trigger: When the bare shortcut feels rough
items.notes: Async confirmation: shortcut returns immediately, follow-up notification on extraction complete ('captured 2 entities: Alice, Acme'); accept dictation in other languages

items.title: PWA polish
items.notes: Offline shell with read-only graph cache (last 100 query results); dark mode; search-as-you-type for past episodes

items.title: Long-form architecture writeup at brain.{domain}/notes/architecture
items.trigger: Treat as the link in resume / cover letter / Twitter bio
items.notes: Sections: what this is, the bet (graph vs vector), the decisions, what surprised, what I'd do differently, what's next. No-auth public page served by the PWA.
